strengths: 20 years of diverse software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains demonstrates deep technical foundation
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing recent engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies
Full-stack builder with demonstrated ability to architect across multiple languages and platforms (TypeScript, Node.js, D, cloud infrastructure)
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field; formal education limited to undergraduate CS and Fine Arts degrees
Career progression shows engineering execution roles rather than director-level strategic leadership or platform innovation responsibilities
Very recent transition to AI focus (April 2025); previous 3+ years focused on direct mail pricing optimization, not AI strategy or platform development
response.justification: This candidate possesses solid engineering credentials with 20 years of technical experience and current exposure to AI infrastructure work. However, the role explicitly requires director-level individual contributor strategic expertise in AI and cloud platform innovation. The resume demonstrates deep technical execution across multiple domains but lacks evidence of strategic leadership, recognized AI/ML expertise, published products built with AI, or the kind of platform strategy work that defines the position. The recent AI pivot is promising but insufficient to establish the recognized thought leadership the role demands.
